Update ASP.NET Core dependencies and add Kestrel in ImageRendererServer (#9352)

- Bump Microsoft.AspNetCore from 2.2.0 to 2.3.9

   - Add Microsoft.AspNetCore.Server.Kestrel 2.3.9
